bead.title: routing: consume assembled KnownModel snapshot for autorouting
bead.description:
Review of fizeau-e6145528 found the enriched fiz models list is not used by autorouting. The epic intent says routing and operator introspection should share one snapshot so there is no separate view of what routing thinks exists.

In scope:
- routing candidate construction or service routing adapter that consumes modelregistry KnownModel snapshot data
- tests proving catalog-only models are not routable and discovered provider models are routable through the shared snapshot
- preserving explicit hard pins and existing policy behavior

Out of scope:
- Runtime signal production and quota/latency fields if not already landed; depend on those beads as needed.
bead.acceptance:
1. go test ./internal/routing/... ./internal/modelregistry/... -run "Snapshot|KnownModel|AutoRoutable|CatalogOnly" -count=1 passes and proves routing candidate eligibility is derived from the assembled KnownModel snapshot, not a separate catalog-only path.
2. go test . -run "TestServiceRoute.*Snapshot|TestServiceRoute.*CatalogOnly|TestServiceRoute.*HardPin" -count=1 passes with service-level coverage.
3. go test ./... -count=1 passes.
